name: p7d-markdown-it-figure-with-p-caption
description: convert into the figure element with the figcaption element, for a paragraph with only images, or a table or a code block or a blockquote, and by writing a caption paragraph immediately before or after.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.disableS.description: Disable the default CSS of p7d-markdown-it-figure-with-p-caption.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.label.un.description: Display marks caption's unnumbered label. Comma-separated list (img, table, video, pre-code, pre-samp). Blockquote is enabled by default; use no-blockquote or unblockquote to exclude it.
Display all caption's unnumbered label. Overrides option: label.unnumbered.displayMarks.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.label.jo.description: Convert full-width space to half-width space in label joint.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.w.description: Disable wrapping iframe elements without captions by figure elements.
Disable wrapping iframe type blockquote elements without captions by figure elements.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.c.description: Specify default class name of figure element that Wrap iframe type blockquote.
Specify default class name of figure element that wraps slide captions.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.w.description: Disable wrapping video elements without captions by figure elements.
Disable wrapping audio elements without captions by figure elements.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.caption..description: Disable automatic caption detection from image alt/title when no caption paragraph exists.
Auto caption from img alt text. Set true to use auto labels, or set a label string. Example: "Figure" , "図"
Auto caption from img title text. Set true to use auto labels, or set a label string. Example: "Figure" , "図"

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.command..description: When creating a caption paragraph from image attributes using the setImgAttrToPCaption command, specify the caption label language when the attribute value does not have a label.: "ja"(default), "en"

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.r.description: Set role="doc-example" to figure element that has > pre > :is(code|samp) element.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.a.description: Comma-separated list of caption types to auto-number (img, table).

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.s.description: Disable style processing for markdown-it-attrs in figure captions.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.label.nu.description: Add number classes to caption labels.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.label.pr.description: Optional leading marker(s) before label. Comma-separated list for prev/next markers.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.label.al.description: Allow marker-only captions to reuse label.prefixMarker.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.o.description: Disable converting single image paragraphs without captions to figure.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.caption..description: Remove mark name from caption class names.
Wrap caption body text with a span for styling.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.figure.c.description: Class name for all iframe type figures. Empty uses the default: f-embed.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.image.sc.description: Disable scale suffix handling in markdown-it-renderer-image.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.image.re.description: Disable title-based resize handling in markdown-it-renderer-image.
Resolve final img src from frontmatter/urlImageBase.
Keep resize hints in the title attribute. Default is false (hints are moved to data attributes).
Data attribute name to store resize hints when titles are removed. Empty lets the extension choose (data-img-resize for preview).

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.fence.li.description: Disable line number spans in markdown-it-renderer-fence.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.fence.em.description: Disable emphasize line ranges in markdown-it-renderer-fence.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.fence.sa.description: Comma-separated list of languages to remove from the default samp list (samp always uses <samp>). Default list is shell,console.

p7dMarkdownItFigureWithPCaption.command..description: Disable numbering img captions in setFigureCaptionNumber command.
Number table captions in setFigureCaptionNumber command.
Set numbered caption labels into image alt text in setFigureCaptionNumber command.

scripts.test:preview-scripts: node test/smoke-extension-host-utils.mjs && node test/smoke-preview-attribute.mjs && node test/smoke-preview-resize-hint-cleanup.mjs && node test/smoke-preview-resize-dimension-stability.mjs && node test/smoke-preview-figure-caption.mjs && node test/smoke-preview-frontmatter-priority.mjs && node test/smoke-disable-style.mjs && node test/smoke-renderer-fence-em-lines.mjs
